snippet: Dear Ms. Worms, Thank you for your message. Yes, Thursday at 13:00 works very well for me. I will send you the document confirming the transfer to the blocked account a bit later. Kind regards, Denys
subject: Re: Confirmation of Funds Received and Meeting Availability
body:
Dear Ms. Worms,

Thank you for your message.

Yes, Thursday at 13:00 works very well for me.

I will send you the document confirming the transfer to the blocked account
a bit later.

Kind regards,
Denys Maiorov

вт, 17 февр. 2026 г., 10:09 Info - L'hermitage <info@lhermitage.be>:

> Dear Denys,
>
>
>
> Thank you for your e-mail.
>
> The attached document shows me that you have received from Vlaams
> Woningfonds the amount of 2.250,-€.
>
> Can you please send me the document that it has been transferred to a
> blocked account for the apartment?
>
>
>
> This Thursday I could meet you at the apartment at 13 o’clock if this
> works for you?
>
>
>
> Kind regards,
>
>
>
> Evelyn Worms
>
> L’Hermitage N.V.
>
> Sint Jobsteenweg 21 B
> <https://www.google.com/maps/search/Sint+Jobsteenweg+21+B?entry=gmail&source=g>
>
> 2970  Schilde
>
> 0475/677 696
>
>
>
> *From:* Denys Maiorov <denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com>
> *Sent:* maandag 16 februari 2026 16:09
> *To:* Info - L'hermitage <info@lhermitage.be>
> *Subject:* Confirmation of Funds Received and Meeting Availability
>
>
>
> Dear Ms. Worms,
>
> I would like to inform you that the funds from the Vlaams Woningfonds have
> now been received in the blocked account.
>
> If our meeting on Friday morning remains convenient for you, that would be
> perfectly fine for me. However, I would also like to mention that I am free
> this Thursday and could come at any time during the day if that is more
> suitable for you.
>
> Please let me know what works best.
>
> Kind regards,
> Denys Maiorov
>
